description: You are a Teaching Assistant digitizing a Calculus midterm exam. In the document '/home/ga/Documents/calculus_midterm_draft.odt', replace the bold placeholders with properly formatted mathematical formulas. Replace '[INSERT QUADRATIC FORMULA]' with the standard quadratic formula (x = (-b ± sqrt(b^2 - 4ac)) / 2a) rendered as a fraction with a square root symbol. Replace '[INSERT DERIVATIVE DEFINITION]' with the limit definition of a derivative (f'(x) = lim (h -> 0) [ (f(x+h) - f(x)) / h ]) where 'h -> 0' appears underneath the limit operator. Replace '[INSERT DEFINITE INTEGRAL]' with the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus example (Integral from a to b of x^2 dx = (b^3 - a^3) / 3) using the integral symbol with 'a' as subscript and 'b' as superscript. Save the finalized document as '/home/ga/Documents/calculus_midterm_final.odt' in ODT format.
